home.heroTitle: Bring your game to market. You're not alone.
home.heroDescription: An indie developer faces an uphill battle to finish and publish their game. Ancester reviews your idea, asks the right questions, negotiates a fair deal, and finishes the job with you.
home.weCreateDesc: We build your gamer website (or whatever your game needs to launch).
home.wePublishDesc: Marketing and positioning so your game reaches its audience.
home.weAdviseDesc: We guide you to make better decisions during development.
home.workModel: We work as a Partner (revenue share) or as a Collaborator (per-project or monthly fee).

login.title: Login
login.demoWarning: Demo version — data is not saved
login.demoModalInfo: This is a demo version of the project.
login.demoModalLoginDesc: This is what the login would look like. Users would enter their credentials to access their personal dashboard, courses, marketplace, and more.
login.demoModalSignupDesc: This is what new user registration would look like. Interested users would fill out a form to create an account on the platform.
login.demoModalDevText: This feature is not currently available as we do not have a backend implemented. The project is in a demonstration phase.

contacto.title: Contact
contacto.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project or inquiry
contacto.successTitle: We'll contact you after reviewing your message
